semantic.role: Vitest integration test suite for sync command CLI argument validation in repair mode
responsibilities: verify that the sync command rejects unrecognized flags like --bogus
verify that --hook and --retry-failed together are rejected
verify that --repair-violations and --retry-failed together are rejected
provide mock runtime service and sync implementation for isolated testing
outOfScope: testing the actual sync workflow logic
testing the full CLI lifecycle integration
invariants: test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (architectural rule test-file-suffix)

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure that the sync command's CLI argument validation correctly rejects conflicting flag combinations before any sync execution occurs
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Applied release gate fixes and synced accumulated source changes; the test suite was likely updated to cover the new validation rules introduced by the fixes
